semantic.role: Public protocol facade module providing a stable entry point for importing all ArchSpine protocol types.
responsibilities: Re-exports all protocol type definitions from the internal module './protocol/index.js'.
Provides a single, stable import path for external consumers of the ArchSpine protocol.
Decouples the internal protocol module structure from external dependencies.
outOfScope: Defining new protocol types or interfaces.
Handling runtime instantiation of protocol objects.
invariants: Must only contain re-exports from the internal protocol module.
Must not contain any local type definitions or logic.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable public API boundary for the protocol subsystem, insulating consumers from internal restructuring.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of refactoring to establish subsystem facades; this file serves as the facade for the protocol subsystem.

publicSurface: All symbols exported from './protocol/index.js' are publicly exposed.
